identity_baseline: Small, six-limbed alien lifeforms characterized by a grotesque morphology.

stable_visual_summary: Small, grotesque alien creatures featuring a six-limbed morphology. Their anatomy is defined by the presence of antennae and independent eyes. They are visually associated with emerging from large white eggs within an incubator setting.
